# ConduitScore - Full AI Agent Context

> AI Visibility Score Scanner - The comprehensive tool for measuring and improving how AI agents see your website

This is the extended version of ConduitScore's machine-readable site description. For the concise version, see /llms.txt.

## Company Overview

ConduitScore is a SaaS platform founded in 2026 that scans websites and produces an AI visibility score (0-100). The score measures how well AI agents like ChatGPT (OpenAI), Perplexity, Claude (Anthropic), and Gemini (Google) can discover, read, understand, and cite the website content in their generated responses.

The platform was built by a team of SEO engineers, AI researchers, and web performance specialists who recognized that the shift from traditional search engines to AI-powered answer engines requires a fundamentally different approach to web optimization.

## Problem We Solve

Most websites were built for human visitors and Google crawlers. AI agents process information differently:
- They need structured data (JSON-LD, schema.org) to understand entities and relationships
- They need explicit crawler permissions (robots.txt) for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot
- They need machine-readable content surfaces (llms.txt) for quick site understanding
- They need content formatted for extraction and citation, not just display
- They need clear heading hierarchies and semantic HTML for content parsing

Without these signals, websites are invisible to the fastest-growing discovery channel on the internet.

## How ConduitScore Works

### Step 1: Enter a URL
Users paste any public website URL into the scanner. No account or installation required for the free tier.

### Step 2: Real Browser Audit
ConduitScore uses Conduit, a real audited browser pipeline, to render the page. This means the scan reflects what AI agents actually see, including JavaScript-rendered content, not just static HTML source.

### Step 3: Seven-Category Analysis
The scanner evaluates the page across seven categories simultaneously:

#### 1. Crawler Access (15 points max)
- Checks if robots.txt exists
- Verifies permissions for GPTBot (OpenAI), ClaudeBot (Anthropic), PerplexityBot
- Also checks for OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, Claude-Web, Amazonbot, anthropic-ai, Google-Extended, Googlebot, Bingbot, cohere-ai
- Deducts points for each blocked AI crawler

#### 2. Structured Data (20 points max)
- Detects JSON-LD script tags with application/ld+json type
- Awards points for having any JSON-LD markup
- Awards bonus points for FAQPage schema specifically
- Checks for Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication, HowTo, and other schema types

#### 3. Content Structure (15 points max)
- Verifies exactly one H1 tag (penalizes missing or multiple)
- Checks for 2+ H2 tags for section hierarchy
- Awards points for H3 tags
- Detects FAQ sections (looks for section/div elements with faq, frequently, or question in classes/IDs)

#### 4. LLMs.txt (10 points max)
- Checks for /llms.txt file at the site root
- Awards points for file presence
- Awards bonus for content length > 100 characters
- Awards bonus for having markdown headers (#) and URLs (http)

#### 5. Technical Health (15 points max)
- Measures page load time (under 2 seconds is ideal)
- Checks for viewport meta tag (mobile-readiness)
- Checks for meta description tag
- Checks for charset declaration

#### 6. Citation Signals (15 points max)
- Counts external links to different domains (3+ is ideal)
- Checks for link to /about page
- Checks for link to /contact page
- Checks for author attribution (meta name="author" or class containing "author")

#### 7. Content Quality (10 points max)
- Measures word count (1000+ is ideal, 300+ is acceptable)
- Checks for date/freshness signals (time tags, "published", "updated", "date" keywords)
- Counts paragraph tags (5+ is ideal)

### Step 4: Copy-Paste Fixes
Every issue detected comes with a ready-to-implement code fix. Users can copy the fix directly into their codebase without needing to understand the underlying technical requirements.

## Key Pages

### Public Pages
- Homepage (https://conduitscore.com/): Free scanner, 7-category breakdown, FAQ, how it works
- Pricing (https://conduitscore.com/pricing): Four tiers from free to enterprise
- About (https://conduitscore.com/about): Company mission, problem statement, beliefs
- Contact (https://conduitscore.com/contact): Support, sales, enterprise, social links
- Blog (https://conduitscore.com/blog): Educational content on AI visibility optimization
- SaaS Use Case (https://conduitscore.com/use-cases/saas): AI visibility for SaaS companies
- E-Commerce Use Case (https://conduitscore.com/use-cases/ecommerce): AI visibility for online stores
- Agencies Use Case (https://conduitscore.com/use-cases/agencies): White-label AI auditing

### Blog Articles
- What is AI SEO? (https://conduitscore.com/blog/what-is-ai-seo)
- How to Optimize for ChatGPT (https://conduitscore.com/blog/how-to-optimize-for-chatgpt)
- LLMs.txt Guide (https://conduitscore.com/blog/llms-txt-guide)
- Structured Data for AI (https://conduitscore.com/blog/structured-data-for-ai)
- AI Crawler Access Guide (https://conduitscore.com/blog/ai-crawler-access-guide)
- GEO vs SEO (https://conduitscore.com/blog/geo-vs-seo)

### Authenticated Pages
- Dashboard (https://conduitscore.com/dashboard): Scan history, monitoring
- Projects (https://conduitscore.com/projects): Project-level scan organization
- Settings (https://conduitscore.com/settings): Account and billing management

## Pricing Details

### Free Tier
- 3 scans per month
- Single URL analysis
- No sign-up required
- Full 7-category report
- Copy-paste fixes included

### Starter ($29/month)
- 50 scans per month
- Dashboard access with scan history
- Email alerts for score changes
- SEO scoring integration

### Pro ($199/month)
- 500 scans per month
- Site-wide crawling (multiple pages per domain)
- Competitor tracking and comparison
- PDF report generation
- Priority support

### Agency ($499/month)
- Unlimited scans
- REST API access for programmatic scanning
- White-label branding
- Multi-client dashboard
- Dedicated account management

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js 15 (React framework)
- Real browser rendering via Conduit pipeline
- Hosted on Vercel
- Scan results include cryptographic proof artifacts (DOM hash, ed25519 signature)
- Database-backed scan history for authenticated users
- Rate limiting: 10 requests per minute per IP for anonymous users

## Domain Expertise

ConduitScore specializes in:
- AI Search Optimization (AI SEO)
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
- AI crawler access configuration
- Structured data for AI readability (JSON-LD, schema.org)
- LLMs.txt standard implementation
- E-E-A-T signals for AI systems
- Content optimization for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini
- AI visibility scoring methodology
- Technical SEO for the agent economy
